allow: PowerShell(Select-String -Path D:\\IM_AI_folder\\.env -Pattern "OLLAMA_MODEL|OLLAMA_URL|OPENAI_API_KEY" ; "---dotenv load?---"; Select-String -Path D:\\IM_AI_folder\\backend\\main.py -Pattern "dotenv|load_dotenv|.env" | Select-Object -First 5)

PowerShell(d:\\IM_AI_folder\\myenv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "import backend.api.insightmesh.ask; import backend.insight.debate.evidence_store; import backend.insight.deep_classify.classifier; print\('all imports OK'\)")
PowerShell($ol = Get-Command ollama -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($ol\) { Write-Output "ollama found: $\($ol.Source\)"; ollama list } else { Write-Output "ollama NOT on PATH" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path D:\\IM_AI_folder -File -Force | Select-Object Name; "---FE---"; Get-ChildItem -Path D:\\IM_AI_folder\\insightmesh-fe -File -Force | Select-Object Name; "---BACKEND---"; Get-ChildItem -Path D:\\IM_AI_folder\\backend -File -Force | Select-Object Name; "---DOCS---"; Get-ChildItem -Path D:\\IM_AI_folder\\docs -File -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)
